listing.name: LastGate
listing.tagline: A pre-flight gatekeeper for AI-generated code.
listing.short_description: Intercepts commits from Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and Devin — runs safety checks, blocks bad code, and feeds failures back to the agent so it can self-correct.
listing.introductory_description: AI coding agents ship more production code every day, but they ship it unchecked: leaked secrets, broken builds, vulnerable dependencies, files that should never be committed, and repeated thrash on the same problem. LastGate installs as a GitHub App and turns every push and pull request into a configurable safety pipeline. Failures block the merge via branch protection and are posted as structured PR comments that agents can parse and act on automatically — closing the loop so the agent fixes its own mistakes.

pricing_plans.name: Free
pricing_plans.description: For solo developers and open-source. Public repositories, all core checks, and the @lastgate/solo-dev policy pack.
bullets: All regex + entropy checks (secrets, deps, files, agent patterns)

pricing_plans.name: Team
pricing_plans.description: For teams shipping with AI agents on private repositories. Adds private repos, the LLM semantic-review tier, and the hardened @lastgate/agent-safety pack.

pricing_plans.name: Enterprise
pricing_plans.description: Per-seat pricing for organizations. Adds audit logs, SSO, custom policy packs, and priority support.
